Fix next time: Add genuine texture and rim-light to the large flat strata bands and plain reservoir lenses, and fill the quiet lower-half dead zones on cover (S1) and close (S9) so every region survives the zoom test.

Automation changes this run (1)
The routine modified its own machinery this run. If a later week looks worse, this dated section is the rollback trail (each set reverts as one commit).
KindChangeRollback
fix
assets		New committed helper assets/js/aklabel.js: AK.canvasLabel(cx,x,y,text,{color,align}) draws any canvas-rendered label with an opaque knockout plate under the glyphs (auto-picking a near-black/near-white plate from the text luminance), so an in-scene label's contrast depends on (text,plate) only and never on the art beneath; AK.rectsOverlap keeps stacked labels from merging. Documented in SKILL.md. Opt-in; DOM/SVG text still preferred where layout allows.
why: Run 2026-07-11 dominant defect class: machine_qa PASSED 0/0 yet the pixel critics caught ~10 canvas/decorative labels that were illegible -- S4 mono readouts ~1.5:1 on the ochre strata band, S6 SUSPEN		revert the upgrade(2026-07-11) commit
upgrade(2026-07-11) commit 814b8c4 on PR #22 (revert this single prefixed commit to roll back)
